title: OFF TO DENTIST — Eva clutches Sara's hand at the car door
prompt: Wide shot in @driveway, warm golden morning sunlight. The gray Tesla Model 3 sedan is parked on the asphalt driveway. @Mama stands in the FOREGROUND on the LEFT, holding the rear passenger door open, smiling gently. @Sara stands on the RIGHT right at the open door of the car. @Eva stands directly beside Sara, smaller, gripping Sara's hand firmly with both of her own, eyes wide and worried. None of them are walking. Eva (small whisper, looking up at her sister): "Don't let go!" Sara (squeezing back, steady): "Never. Sister-promise." Eva (taking a deep brave breath): "…sister-promise."
